hypothesis.thesis_statement: A Growth-at-Reasonable-Price composite ranking A-share mainboard stocks by joint signals of net profit growth, revenue trend, value (earnings yield), and quality (ROE + margin trend) will outperform on a long-short basis because the market overpays for pure growth and undervalues cheap growth, and the multi-component composite is more robust to single-factor noise than PEG ratio alone.
hypothesis.mechanism: Classic GARP insight: market overpays for pure growth (high P/E growth stocks) and undervalues cheap growth (moderate P/E + sustained growth). PEG (price/earnings/growth) is the simplest expression but vulnerable to single-quarter noise. A weighted multi-factor composite combining current growth (grow_netprofit_yoy, Phase 1 Sharpe +1.43), growth persistence (grow_rev_trend), value (val_ep_ttm), and quality (qual_roe + qual_margin_trend) is structurally more diversified. This hypothesis runs on the broad eligible universe (no growth filter at Layer 2) and lets the composite signal do the selection.

source.title: Phase 1 quick-kill screening for growth-stock hypothesis-driven plan

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: The GARP composite collapses to a value-dominated signal (val_ep_ttm carries most of the load) because grow_rev_trend has Phase 1 LS Sharpe of -0.84 and grow_netprofit_yoy has only +1.43. If the value leg dominates, the hypothesis becomes structurally indistinguishable from the existing comp_val_qual factor, which would fail the baseline-beat custom rule.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: That equal-ish weighting across growth/value/quality (approximately 0.40 growth + 0.25 value + 0.35 quality) captures a genuine GARP premium rather than just replicating the existing comp_val_qual composite which already ranks well in the catalog. Also assumes that grow_rev_trend's negative LS Sharpe in Phase 1 sandbox is mitigated by neutralization and broader universe in formal IS.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: Falsified if formal IS rank_icir < 0.025, OR GARP composite rank_icir is not at least 0.010 absolute higher than comp_val_qual rank_icir on the same window (the baseline-beat custom rule), OR cost-adjusted Sharpe is negative, OR sealed OOS rank_ic falls outside [0.020, 0.050] CI.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: Lower cost sensitivity than Hypothesis A because the broader universe and 10-day rebalance keep turnover below 3.0x annually. Expected to remain positive after 10-15 bps round-trip costs. The 5B market cap floor reduces impact costs vs micro-caps.
